visual_description: In a coffee shop setting, a man wearing a blue polo shirt and white pants sits on an orange couch, gesturing with his hands while speaking to someone off‑camera. He then leans forward, causing the waistband of pink lace underwear to become visible above his light‑colored pants, while a man in a red shirt seated nearby watches with a surprised expression. The man in blue sits back up, and both men appear to continue their conversation.
